title: Red Bull M.E.O./Season 4/India

{{DISPLAYTITLE: Red Bull M.E.O. Season 4: India}} {{Infobox league |game=bgmi |liquipediatier=3 |name=Red Bull M.E.O. Season 4: India |tickername=Red Bull M.E.O. S4 India |shortname=Red Bull M.E.O. S4 India |image=Red Bull M.E.O. Season 4 allmode.png |type=Online |team_number=24 |icon= |series=Red Bull M.E.O. |organizer=Red Bull Gaming |organizer-link=https://www.redbull.com/in-en/hubs/gaming/ |organizer2= NODWIN Gaming |sponsor=[https://www.redbull.com/in-en/hubs/gaming/ Red Bull Gaming] |mode=squads |prizepool=19,20,000 |localcurrency=inr |country=India |perspective=tpp |sdate=2021-12-03 |edate=2021-12-05 |web=https://www.redbull.com/in-en/events/red-bull-m-e-o |twitter=redbullgaming |instagram=redbullgaming |youtube2=c/redbullgaming |facebook=RedBullGaming |twitch=RedBull |next=Red_Bull_M.E.O./Season_6/India{{!}}Season 6 }} The '''Red Bull M.E.O. Season 4: India''' is a [[Battlegrounds Mobile India|BGMI]] tournament under the '''''Red Bull M.E.O.''''' series. Organized by '''[https://www.redbull.com/in-en/hubs/gaming/ Red Bull Gaming]''' in association with '''[https://nodwingaming.com/ NODWIN Gaming]''' the tournament features a prize pool in the form of attendance fees of ₹19,20,000 {{Abbr/INR}}. ==About== ===Broadcast Talent=== {{box|start|padding=1em}} {{broadcasterCard |position=Host |b1=Bloter }} {{box|break|padding=1em}} {{broadcasterCard |position=Hindi Commentator |b1=Ocean|b1link=Ocean (Caster) |b2=Fyxs }} {{box|break|padding=2em}} {{broadcasterCard |position=Hindi Analyst |b1=Shadow|b1link=Shadow (Caster) |b2=SuperJonny }} {{box|break|padding=2em}} {{broadcasterCard |position=Interviewer |b1=Kaashvi|b1name=Kasshvi Hiranandani|b1flag=in }} {{box|end}} ===Format=== '''''Red Bull M.E.O Seson 4 India: '''2nd December to 5th December, 2021'' ''Maps: {{Abbr/TPP}} [[Erangel]], [[Miramar]] and [[Sanhok]] '' * '''''Semi-Finals: '''3rd December to 4th December, 2021'' * ''24 Teams (20 Invited + 4 from Online Qualifiers) divided into 3 groups '' (A, B, and C) * '' 8 Teams in each group'' * ''Teams will compete in a round robin format'' * ''12 Matches to be played over a period of 2 days (Each team to play 8 Matches).'' * ''{{bgcolortext|up|'''Top 16 teams '''}} from the overall standings will advance to the Grand Finals ''.
* '''''Grand Finals: '''5th December 2021'' * ''16 teams will face off in 6 matches in a single day to decide the winner.'' ====Matchdays==== ====Points Distribution==== {| class="wikitable" style="text-align:center;" ! colspan="2"|Points Distribution |- |'''''Finish Points''''' ||''1 per finish'' |- !width=101px|Place !width=101px|Points |- |{{Placement|1}}||15 |- |{{Placement|2}}||12 |- |{{Placement|3}}||10 |- |{{Placement|4}}||8 |- |{{Placement|5}}||6 |- |{{Placement|6}}||4 |- |{{Placement|7}}||2 |- |{{Placement|8-12}}||1 |- |{{Placement|13-16}}||0 |} ===Prize Pool=== ''₹19,20,000 {{Abbr/INR}} ( $25,585 {{Abbr/USD}} ) are spread among the teams in the form of attendance fee as seen below:''
{{box|start|padding=2em}} {{prize pool start team |localcurrency=inr}} {{prize pool slot team |place=1 |localprize=80,000|Enigma Gaming}} {{prize pool slot team |place=2 |localprize=80,000|skylightz gaming in}} {{prize pool slot team |place=3 |localprize=80,000|Godlike Esports}} {{prize pool slot team |place=4 |localprize=80,000|XSpark}} {{prize pool slot team |place=5 |localprize=80,000|Orangutan}} {{prize pool slot team |place=6 |localprize=80,000|Team XO}} {{prize pool slot team |place=7 |localprize=80,000|Rivalry Esports}} {{prize pool slot team |place=8 |localprize=80,000|Celsius}} {{prize pool slot team |place=9 |localprize=80,000|TEAM iNSANE}} {{prize pool slot team |place=10 |localprize=80,000|Chemin Esports}} {{prize pool slot team |place=11 |localprize=80,000|Nigma Galaxy}} {{prize pool slot team |place=12 |localprize=80,000|Velocity Gaming}} {{prize pool slot team |place=13 |localprize=80,000|8bit}} {{prize pool slot team |place=14 |localprize=80,000|Elite Esports (Indian Team)}} {{prize pool slot team |place=15 |localprize=80,000|tsm/mobile}} {{prize pool slot team |place=16 |localprize=80,000|Team Forever}} {{prize pool slot team |place=17 |localprize=80,000|marcos gaming}} {{prize pool slot team |place=18 |localprize=80,000|stalwart in}} {{prize pool slot team |place=19 |localprize=80,000|7sea esports in}} {{prize pool slot team |place=20 |localprize=80,000|agra esports warrior}} {{prize pool slot team |place=21 |localprize=80,000|oresports}} {{prize pool slot team |place=22 |localprize=80,000|revenant esports}} {{prize pool slot team |place=23 |localprize=80,000|team soul}} {{prize pool slot team |place=24 |localprize=80,000|odyssey esports}} {{Prize pool end}} * ''''' The Winning team will get to watch the 2022 Formula One Austrian Grand Prix at the red bull ring. Alongside an exclusive tour to the Hangar-7 museum, Austria will also be provided.''''' * ''''' Each finish done by a team will add 0.00042 BTC to their prize pool. The Bitcoin transactions will be done via [https://www.instagram.com/coindcxofficial/?hl=en/ Coin DCX] (Upto to 1 BTC) {{box|break|padding=2em}} {{prize pool start award||style=margin: 0 auto;||localcurrency=inr}} {{prize pool slot award|award=MVP|localprize=0|JONATHAN|flag1=in|team1=godlike esports}} {{Prize pool end}}
